# Broken links (on purpose)

Every link on this page is meant to fail to resolve. It exists to test how the
reader handles links that point nowhere.

- [A note that does not exist](does-not-exist.md)
- [A note in a missing folder](../nowhere/ghost.md)
- [An image that is missing](../assets/missing.png)
- [An absolute-looking path](/etc/hostname)
- [An empty target]()

For contrast, this one *does* work: [back to home](../index.md).
